item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Students still working on their 40 volunteer hours are encouraged to check the Teams for approved opportunities or speak with a Guidance Counsellor for help getting started.

item.title: A message from Ms. Burnie and Mr. Warner:
item.description: The 7 - 8 girls' basketball team travelled to Kemptville last Thursday to play St. Mikes! The girls played hard from start to finish but lost a tough battle to a solid team - the good news is they get a rematch at the District 5 Championships on April 13th. Great job girls!

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: As you heard, this is Holy Week! Any high school students wishing to help out behind the scenes for this week's prayer service, please see Mr. Vonesch at the chapel today

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: To our prayer service music ministry – please come to the chaplaincy office at lunch today for a brief meeting. Thank you

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Reminding all Varsity Badminton players - we have a practice today after school! Please make sure you have your Ravens T-shirt for our TEAM picture at 2:20pm Our 1st tournament is this Wednesday! Please chat with Mrs. Longval if you have any questions.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval :
item.description: ALL students who have signed up interested in participating in Varsity Track and Field are reminded of today's brief meeting at 10:45am in the gymnasium. Sign ups sheets are being taken down today - so if you're interested in signing up - please do so ASAP.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Weight Room is OPEN today, Tomorrow and Thursday at lunch. It is closed on Wednesday.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: Just a reminder to all ski/snowboarders to please return your arm band during the lunch hour today.

item.title: A message from Mr. Benoit:
item.description: There will be a meeting today in room 247/248 for both 7&8 hockey teams at 11:20
